title: A Modern Utopia
description: A Modern Utopia — knowledge fragments for AI agents

memes.label: About This Wiki
memes.description: A knowledge wiki for "A Modern Utopia" — this page is auto-generated from book metadata

memes.label: 'Alcohol and Temperance'
memes.description: 'The utopian approach to alcohol regulation — a case study in how the modern State balances personal freedom with public order, treating intoxication as a problem of rational control rather than prohibition'

memes.label: 'Architecture in Utopia'
memes.description: 'The architectural vision of the modern utopia — emancipated from classical traditions, embracing new materials, and shaped by the quadrangle as the dominant residential form'

memes.label: Art in Utopia
memes.description: 'The role of art, literature, music, and aesthetic creation in the Modern Utopia — where beauty arises not from explicit artistic effort but from the quality of the social atmosphere and purposeful design.'

memes.label: Beauty and Aesthetics in Utopia
memes.description: 'The systematic cultivation of beauty in Utopian life — from coinage and machinery to architecture and moral philosophy.'

memes.label: 'Childhood in Utopia'
memes.description: 'The experience of childhood in the World State — how Utopia transforms child-rearing through state support, scientific nurture, and the redefinition of parental rights as a trusteeship for the future'

memes.label: Clothing and Daily Life
memes.description: 'The material texture of everyday Utopian existence — clothing as personal expression, food and dining, domestic furnishings, and the undisturbed rhythms of daily routine under the World State.'

memes.label: Common Council of Wages Workers
memes.description: 'The Utopian labour governance body that synthesised the old Trade Unions into a constitutional power, setting wage datum lines through conferences with employers.'

memes.label: Communication and Media in Utopia
memes.description: 'Utopian information infrastructure — automated news distribution from wires, journals of thought, and the abolition of commercial media.'

memes.label: Cooperative Associations
memes.description: 'Democratic producer cooperatives in the Modern Utopia, operating under elected managers and paying a share of produce to the State rather than fixed rent.'

memes.label: Death in Utopia
memes.description: 'How the Modern Utopia addresses death — through euthanasia, death duties, and a rational attitude toward mortality — treating the end of life not as a tragedy to be denied but as a practical problem to be managed with dignity.'

memes.label: 'The Dissolution of Utopia'
memes.description: 'The culminating event of A Modern Utopia in which the utopian vision dissolves like a soap-bubble, as the narrator realises the fragility of imagined worlds'

memes.label: 'Dreams and Reality in Utopia'
memes.description: 'The narrative and philosophical device by which Wells frames his utopia as a dream of a parallel planet beyond Sirius — a literary strategy that licenses radical speculation while maintaining a complex relationship with reality'

memes.label: 'Education in Utopia'
memes.description: 'The universal education system of the Modern Utopia and the intellectual training required for membership in the Samurai order'

memes.label: Energy as Currency
memes.description: 'The Utopian economic system in which energy units replace gold as the standard of value, enabling a rational, borderless economy grounded in physical reality rather than fluctuating monetary abstraction.'

memes.label: Fashion and Appearance in Utopia
memes.description: 'The aesthetic norms of personal appearance in the Modern Utopia — a society in which dress is neither uniform nor dominated by fashion, but expresses individual taste within a framework of shared standards of beauty and appropriateness.'

memes.label: 'Food and Dining in Utopia'
memes.description: 'The culture of food and dining in the World State — how the utopian approach to eating reflects broader principles of pleasure without excess, quality without ostentation, and the integration of daily life with the natural environment'

memes.label: 'Governance and Administration in Utopia'
memes.description: 'The administrative machinery of the World State — how census data, universal registration, and statistical book-keeping replace traditional politics with evidence-based governance grounded in continuous measurement of the social organism'

memes.label: 'H.G. Wells'
memes.description: 'English writer (1866–1946), author of A Modern Utopia (1905), prolific in science fiction, social commentary, and utopian literature'

memes.label: Health in Utopia
memes.description: 'The Utopian approach to health as a public responsibility — state-maintained standards of housing, nutrition, and sanitation, the role of doctors, and the debated boundary between natural death and artificial life.'

memes.label: 'History in Utopia'
memes.description: 'How the World State relates to its own history — preserving the memory of the past while refusing to be governed by it, and building a historical science that serves the future rather than glorifying tradition'

memes.label: Hotels and Hospitality in Utopia
memes.description: 'The distinctive Utopian institution of hotels and residential clubs that replaces the private household as the primary unit of daily living — a system that reduces domestic labour, facilitates mobility, and embodies the Utopian synthesis of freedom and community.'

memes.label: Imagination in Utopia
memes.description: 'The role of creative imagination in Wells''s modern utopia — both as the faculty that enables utopian thinking itself and as a human capacity that the Utopian State must protect and cultivate.'

memes.label: 'Individual Freedom'
memes.description: 'The idea that personal liberty is the very substance of life in modern utopian thought, a core value that distinguishes modern utopias from classical ones'

memes.label: Labour in Utopia
memes.description: 'The organisation of work in the Utopian World State, characterised by voluntary mobility, public labour listings, and the abolition of unemployment through economic design.'

memes.label: Language in Utopia
memes.description: 'The Utopian vision of a single world language — not an artificially constructed scientific language but a living, coalesced tongue that emerges from the unification of humanity under the World State.'

memes.label: Law in Utopia
memes.description: 'The legal framework of the Modern Utopia — a system of statutes that defines the boundaries of liberty while maximising individual freedom, distinct from the criminal justice apparatus that handles violations.'

memes.label: 'Leisure and Recreation in Utopia'
memes.description: 'The role of leisure in utopian life — not a reward for work but a source of experiments, philosophy, and new departures, with idleness tolerated as a legitimate use of freedom'

memes.label: Machinery and Industry in Utopia
memes.description: 'The role of machinery and industrial production in the Modern Utopia — where the machine is neither worshipped as a saviour nor feared as a demon but understood as an extension of human purpose that, properly directed, liberates humanity from drudgery.'

memes.label: Marriage in Utopia
memes.description: 'The institution of marriage as reconceived in the Utopian World State, based on contractual freedom, state support for motherhood, and the welfare of children.'

memes.label: Meeting the Utopian Self
memes.description: The narrator's face-to-face encounter with his Utopian double — "my better self" — a moment of intimate self-examination that forms the psychological centre of the Utopian journey.

memes.label: Money in Utopia
memes.description: 'The monetary system of the Modern Utopia — a gold-based coinage supplemented by energy notes, designed to measure real value rather than to serve as an instrument of speculation or accumulation.'

memes.label: Nature in Utopia
memes.description: 'The role of the natural world in the Modern Utopia — as an independent force, a source of beauty, and a domain of human freedom distinct from the planned urban order.'

memes.label: Philosophy in Utopia
memes.description: 'Wells''s philosophical framework of "scepticism of the Instrument of Thought" — a critical examination of the limits of human reasoning, language, and classification as the intellectual foundation of the Modern Utopia.'

memes.label: Population and Parenthood
memes.description: 'The Utopian system of population regulation through marriage and birth laws, state motherhood subsidies, and the principle that no Utopia is possible without controlling demographic growth.'

memes.label: Privacy in Utopia
memes.description: 'The right to personal privacy in the Modern Utopia — a carefully balanced compromise between individual seclusion and communal transparency, distinct from both the exposure of primitive societies and the isolation of modern suburbia.'

memes.label: 'Property in Utopia'
memes.description: 'The treatment of property rights and land ownership in the Modern Utopia, balancing individual possession with collective stewardship'

memes.label: 'Race in Utopia'
memes.description: 'Wells''s treatment of racial difference, integration, and the controversial eugenic discourse in A Modern Utopia'

memes.label: 'Religion in Utopia'
memes.description: 'The Utopian approach to religion as an innate human impulse — to be disciplined rather than suppressed, with the samurai held to a higher standard of rational discrimination in religious matters'

memes.label: Residential Clubs
memes.description: 'The primary residential organisation of Utopian life, where most prosperous citizens live in congenial club communities with shared amenities rather than private houses.'

memes.label: 'Samurai Order'
memes.description: 'The institutional structure of the voluntary nobility that governs the Utopian State — its history, membership, and organisational principles as a political body'

memes.label: 'Sanitation and Hygiene in Utopia'
memes.description: 'The utopian commitment to systematic cleanliness — from disease eradication and building standards to personal hygiene, as an expression of the State''s duty to maintain a minimum standard of life for every citizen'

memes.label: Science and Progress
memes.description: 'The Utopian commitment to a progressive, scientifically-informed state that actively subsidises research, rewards unprofitable but beneficial undertakings, and treats knowledge as a public good.'

memes.label: Sport and Games in Utopia
memes.description: 'The role of amateur sports and games in Utopia — voluntary enthusiasm replacing competitive professionalism.'

memes.label: Standing Committee of Identification
memes.description: 'The Utopian body responsible for identifying and registering strangers and visitors, routing unidentified persons through the appropriate administrative channels.'

memes.label: The Anthropological Examination
memes.description: The narrator and botanist are examined by the Research Professor of Anthropology at the University of London to resolve their identification case — a scene that dramatises the Utopian encounter with the anomalous through scientific method.

memes.label: The Awakening in Utopia
memes.description: The narrator's first morning awakening in a Utopian inn, a moment of disorientation and discovery that marks the transition from dream to immersive experience of the alternative world.

memes.label: The Botanist
memes.description: "The narrator's travelling companion in A Modern Utopia, a scientist whose earthly pragmatism contrasts with Utopian ideals."

memes.label: The Canon
memes.description: 'The institutional body of canonical texts governing Samurai intellectual life, comprising a First Canon of enduring works and a Second Canon of contemporary contributions.'

memes.label: The Encounter at the Inn
memes.description: 'A key narrative episode in "A Modern Utopia" where the narrator and the botanist debate with a Utopian stranger at a mountain inn, dramatising the tension between science, nature, and Utopian social order.'

memes.label: The First Glimpse of Utopia
memes.description: The narrator's first observational encounter with Utopian society — a glimpse of how the World State treats the "feeble and insane" that becomes the first concrete demonstration of Utopian principles in action.

memes.label: The Four Classes
memes.description: 'The Utopian social classification dividing citizens into four temperamental types — Poietic, Kinetic, Dull, and Base — as the foundation for social organisation and governance.'

memes.label: The Lake Lucerne Sojourn
memes.description: The narrator and botanist's extended stay at Lake Lucerne, working five hours a day at wood-carving while awaiting identification, offering the most sustained glimpse of ordinary Utopian daily life.

memes.label: The Mountain Descent
memes.description: The narrator and botanist's descent from the Alpine pass into Utopia — the literal and metaphorical threshold crossing from the known world into the Utopian alternative.

memes.label: 'The Owner of the Voice'
memes.description: 'The narrative persona of A Modern Utopia, a fictionalised version of the author who guides the reader through Wells''s utopian vision'

memes.label: 'The Samurai'
memes.description: 'The voluntary nobility of the Utopian State, a governing order open to all able adults who adopt an austere rule of living, essential to the scheme of the World State'

memes.label: The Train Journey to London
memes.description: The narrator and botanist's first experience of Utopian long-distance travel by corridor train from Lucerne to London, showcasing the integration of comfort, technology, and social design in Utopian infrastructure.

memes.label: The Utopian Double
memes.description: 'The parallel-world counterpart of the narrator in "A Modern Utopia," a Samurai who guides the narrator through Utopian society.'

memes.label: Travel and Transport in Utopia
memes.description: 'The Utopian system of high-speed rail travel, corridor trains functioning as mobile hotels and libraries, and the elimination of national borders enabling seamless global mobility.'

memes.label: University of Utopia
memes.description: 'The higher education and research institutions of the Modern Utopia, comprising vast university complexes with thousands of professors and advanced students.'

memes.label: Urban Planning in Utopia
memes.description: 'The Utopian approach to urban design — planned cities integrating abundant gardens, rational housing, and public spaces, enabled by the World State''s control of land and the elimination of speculative development.'

memes.label: 'Utopian Economics'
memes.description: 'The economic system of the Modern Utopia, including its use of money, distribution of goods and services, and the reconciliation of individual freedom with collective ownership of land'

memes.label: 'The Utopian Journey'
memes.description: 'The narrative frame of A Modern Utopia: the Owner of the Voice and the botanist traverse the Swiss Alps, crossing into a parallel utopian world'

memes.label: 'Utopian Justice'
memes.description: 'The Utopian system of justice, punishment, and the treatment of failures and criminals through island exile rather than imprisonment'

memes.label: Utopian Public Services
memes.description: 'The integrated public administration system of the Modern Utopia, combining labour bureau, post office, and public offices under one roof.'

memes.label: Utopian Schools
memes.description: 'The educational institutions of the Modern Utopia, from infant schools through colleges, forming the intellectual foundation of samurai candidacy.'

memes.label: 'Voice of Nature'
memes.description: 'A recurring philosophical theme in A Modern Utopia: nature provides a grounding counter-force to utopian planning, reminding even the ideal society of wildness, geography, and historical contingency'

memes.label: War and Peace in Utopia
memes.description: 'How the Modern Utopia eliminates war through world unification — not by moral persuasion but by structural design — while acknowledging the Samurai Order''s militant origins and the necessity of a defensive posture against external threats.'

memes.label: 'Women in Utopia'
memes.description: 'The position, economic independence, and motherhood subsidy of women in the Modern Utopia, as distinct from historical subordination'

memes.label: 'World State'
memes.description: 'The global political entity that governs the Modern Utopia, owning all land and providing the framework within which individual freedom is exercised'
